response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, there is virtually no evidence of hands-on C++ development in the last 9+ years, despite the role requiring deep C++/STL expertise for high-performance industrial systems. His recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015 at National Instruments. He lacks demonstrated experience in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), message brokers, MQTT, multi-threaded C++ systems, or IoT protocols critical to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Proven ability to build and contribute to open-source, event-driven systems.
Excellent communication and mentoring skills through workshops and technical leadership.
concerns: No recent C++ development experience; core requirement of the role is severely underrepresented.
Lacks exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols like OPC UA or Modbus.
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK and Kubernetes, with no Azure or industrial platform context.
